svg.title: Requirement Diagram – Autonomous Vehicle (SysML)
svg.desc: Three-level SysML requirement diagram: system, functional, and sub-requirements

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the full system requirements for the autonomous vehicle project')
sendPrompt('Explain REQ-1 line following in detail — what does the vehicle need to do?')
sendPrompt('Explain REQ-2 obstacle avoidance in detail')
sendPrompt('Explain REQ-3 physical constraints for the 3D-printed chassis')
sendPrompt('Explain REQ-1.1: IR sensor line detection requirement')
sendPrompt('Explain REQ-1.2: differential motor speed control for steering')
sendPrompt('Explain REQ-2.1: ultrasonic distance sensing requirement')
sendPrompt('Explain REQ-2.2: obstacle avoidance maneuver requirement')
sendPrompt('Explain REQ-3.1: only mechanical connections allowed, M2 and M3 screws')
sendPrompt('Explain REQ-3.2: battery must be removable from the vehicle')
